# GitHub Copilot Instructions - Research_Map

> **Purpose:** Routing and constraints for Copilot sessions.

## Routing Table

| I need to... | Go to |
|---|---|
| Architecture | `docs/architecture/OVERVIEW.md` |
| Principles | `docs/golden-rules/PRINCIPLES.md` |
| Standards | `docs/golden-rules/CODING_STANDARDS.md` |
| Research workflow | `docs/workflows/DEVELOPMENT.md` |
| Manage research program state | `docs/workflows/RESEARCH_MANAGEMENT.md` |
| Paper writing | `docs/workflows/PAPER_WRITING.md` |
| PR review process | `docs/workflows/PR_REVIEW.md` |
| Testing and reproducibility | `docs/workflows/TESTING.md` |
| Session handoff | `docs/session/SESSION_HANDOFF.md` |
| Docs index | `docs/_INDEX.md` |

## Constraints

1. Do not duplicate docs content in entry files.
2. Do not edit `guide/`.
3. Keep docs freshness tags current.
4. Never fabricate references.
5. Run all validation scripts before merge, including docs/plan integrity checks.
